01 / What I Do

Ground-Up
Site Work

One person, one point of contact, from raw wooded lots to finished grade. Below is the range of work I take on across Becket and the surrounding hilltowns.

A-01

Land Clearing
& Brush Hog

Clearing wooded and overgrown lots, brush hogging fields, and cutting new lines through the trees so a build can begin.

A-02

Tree Removal
& Stump Grinding

Take-downs, storm cleanup and stump grinding — removing what's in the way and grinding it flush below grade.

A-03

Driveways
Graded & Built

New gravel driveways, regrading washed-out roads, and rolling compacted, water-shedding surfaces that hold up to mud season.

A-04

Drainage
Solutions

French drains, culverts and grading that pulls water away from foundations, driveways and low spots for good.

A-05

Title 5
Septic Systems

Full septic installations to Massachusetts Title 5 standard — from perc test coordination through backfill and final grade.

A-06

Stonework, Walkways
& Patios

Stone steps, retaining walls, walkways and patios set into the hillside — the finish work that ties a graded lot together.

02 / Field Log

On the Job

Real machines on real Berkshire ground. A look at the clearing, grading and stonework I've put in.

Start Your Project

From rough ground to finished grade

Rough Lots In.Buildable Ground Out.

Washed-out roads, wet spots, overgrown lots — I've turned all of it into ground you can build a life on. The right iron and someone who knows this terrain make the difference.

03 / How I Work

Simple, Start
to Finish

No layers, no runaround. You talk straight to the person running the machine — from the walkthrough to the final grade.

01

Walk
the Site

I meet you on the property, look at access, grade and soil, and talk through exactly what you want done.

02

Clear
Estimate

You get an honest, itemized price with no vague allowances — you know the number before I start.

03

Get to
Work

The right machine for the job shows up, and the work gets done efficiently with the site kept clean.

04

Finish
Right

I grade out, haul off debris and leave the ground ready for whatever you're building next.

04 / Why Stoney Brook

Built for
Berkshire Ground

Ledge, slope, wet spots and long dirt roads — this terrain eats outfits that aren't from here. I've worked it for years and own the machines to handle it.

  • 01Owner-operatedThe person who quotes the job is the person on the controls — me. No middlemen, no crews you've never met.
  • 02Right-sized fleetMini excavators to full dozers and forestry mulchers — matched to the job so I don't tear up more than I have to.
  • 03Title 5 & permitsI know Massachusetts septic code and the local permitting, so your project stays on the right side of it.
  • 04Clean finishI grade, seed and haul off. You get a site that looks done, not just dug.
Becket, MA · 413·446·9202

The heavy iron to get it done right.
